inputs.label: Number of Decks
inputs.businessContext: Number of decks in the shoe, typically 1-8.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decks in the shoe, typically 1-8.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Decks im Schuh, typischerweise 1-8.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jeux dans le sabot, généralement 1 à 8.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de barajas en el zapato, típicamente 1-8.

inputs.label: Aces Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of aces left in the shoe.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of aces left in the shoe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der im Schuh verbleibenden Asse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'as restants dans le sabot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de ases que quedan en el zapato.

inputs.label: Ten-value Cards Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of 10, J, Q, K left in the shoe.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of 10, J, Q, K left in the shoe.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kart dağıtıcısında kalan 10, J, Q, K sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der verbleibenden 10, B, D, K im Schuh.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de 10, V, D, R restants dans le sabot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de 10, J, Q, K que quedan en el zapato.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد 10، J، Q، K المتبقية في الحذاء.

inputs.label: Other Cards Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of 2-9 cards left in the shoe.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of 2-9 cards left in the shoe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der verbleibenden Karten 2-9 im Schuh.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes 2-9 restantes dans le sabot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas 2-9 que quedan en el zapato.

formulas.blackjackProbability: ((acesRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining)) * (tensRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining - 1)) + (tensRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining)) * (acesRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining - 1))) * 100

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
